query: I've been shipping features for 3 months but our churn rate hasn't improved at all. I'm starting to wonder if we're even building the right things. Can you help me step back and figure out what we should actually be focused on?

we just wrapped up the Q1 release cycle for our project management SaaS. shipped 4 features but I have no idea if any of them mattered. our PM left and nobody defined success metrics. how do I evaluate what worked?

ok so I have these feature requests from customers: SSO integration (enterprise), dark mode (everyone asks), API webhooks (devs), and a mobile app (sales team wants it). I'm a 3-person startup and need to figure out which one to build next quarter. Budget for maybe 1.5 of these.

I want to understand who our actual users are. We have a B2B analytics platform but I suspect the people paying aren't the ones using it daily. Before our next roadmap planning session in 2 weeks I need user research synthesis — personas, pain points, the whole thing.

we launched a redesigned checkout flow 6 weeks ago. conversion was 3.2% before, target was 5%, and we're sitting at 4.1%. The PM says it's a success, I think it's a miss. Can you help us evaluate this properly with a framework?

I keep going back and forth on product direction. Some weeks I think we should double down on our core analytics, other weeks I think we need to pivot to real-time dashboards because that's what competitors are doing. I need a structured way to make this decision.

after shipping the notification system last month we got a lot of complaints but also some good feedback. I need to figure out what to do with all this — some people love it, some hate it. How do I turn this mixed signal into a decision about what to change?

my cofounder and I disagree on what to build next. she wants to invest in enterprise features (SAML, audit logs, role-based access), I want to improve the individual user experience (better onboarding, templates, keyboard shortcuts). we need a way to resolve this that isn't just who argues louder.
I need to build a new dashboard page for our admin panel that shows user engagement metrics — DAU, session length, feature usage. The designs are already done in Figma, I just need to implement it.
we're getting a null pointer exception in our payment processing flow when users have expired credit cards. Here's the stack trace — can you help debug this?

I want to build a new SaaS product from scratch — it's a tool for freelancers to manage their invoices and time tracking. I have the whole vision figured out, I need help designing the UI and picking design tokens.
can you add a dark mode toggle to our settings page? The component library already has theme support, I just need to wire it up. Here's the current settings component.
I need to write a migration plan for moving our database from PostgreSQL to CockroachDB. We've already decided this is the right move, I just need the execution plan.
review PR #247 for me — it adds rate limiting to our API endpoints. I want to make sure the implementation is solid before we merge.
I need competitive research on real-time collaboration tools — Figma, Miro, Excalidraw. Not for any specific product decision yet, I'm just trying to understand the space for a report I'm writing.
our CI pipeline is failing on the e2e tests after we upgraded Playwright. Can you look at the GitHub Actions logs and figure out what broke?
I need to add user analytics tracking to our React app — Mixpanel events for page views, button clicks, and form submissions. Already have the Mixpanel SDK installed.
help me refactor our authentication middleware. It's gotten really messy with too many special cases for different API key types.
